{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"call_414b6328a8a94c729e9e04d0","type":"tool_result","content":"1\t# Pluck Debug Flags and Logging Configuration\n2\t\n3\t**Date:** 2026-07-09  \n4\t**Workspace:** /home/coding/ARMOR  \n5\t**NEEDLE Project:** /home/coding/NEEDLE\n6\t\n7\t## Overview\n8\t\n9\tPluck is a strand within the NEEDLE worker system that selects beads for processing. Debug logging for Pluck filtering decisions is controlled via Rust's standard `RUST_LOG` environment variable using the `tracing` crate.\n10\t\n11\t## Primary Debug Configuration\n12\t\n13\t### Environment Variable: `RUST_LOG`\n14\t\n15\t**Purpose:** Controls the log level for specific Rust modules and functions in the NEEDLE binary.\n16\t\n17\t**Format:** `RUST_LOG=<module_path>=<log_level>[,<module_path>=<log_level>]`\n18\t\n19\t## Available Log Levels\n20\t\n21\t| Level | Usage | Verbosity |\n22\t|-------|-------|-----------|\n23\t| `error` | Only errors (default if RUST_LOG not set) | Minimal |\n24\t| `warn` | Warnings and errors | Low |\n25\t| `info` | Informational messages | Medium |\n26\t| `debug` | Detailed debugging information | High |\n27\t| `trace` | Extremely detailed execution trace | Maximum |\n28\t\n29\t## Pluck-Specific Module Paths\n30\t\n31\t### Primary Pluck Module\n32\t```\n33\tneedle::strand::pluck\n34\t```\n35\t**Controls:** Core Pluck strand evaluation, filtering decisions, candidate selection logic\n36\t\n37\t### Related Module Paths\n38\t```\n39\tneedle::strand          # All strand implementations (includes Pluck)\n40\tneedle::worker          # Worker state machine and coordination\n41\tneedle::bead_store      # Bead storage and retrieval operations\n42\tneedle::dispatch        # Task dispatching and execution\n43\t```\n44\t\n45\t## Recommended Debug Configurations\n46\t\n47\t### 1. Minimal Pluck Debug Output\n48\t```bash\n49\tRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug\n50\t```\n51\t**Shows:** Filtering decisions, candidate counts, exclusion reasons\n52\t\n53\t### 2. Comprehensive Pluck Trace\n54\t```bash\n55\tRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace\n56\t```\n57\t**Shows:** Extremely detailed execution flow, function entry/exit, all variables\n58\t\n59\t### 3. Full Strand Context\n60\t```bash\n61\tRUST_LOG=needle::strand=debug,needle::strand::pluck=trace\n62\t```\n63\t**Shows:** All strand activity with detailed Pluck trace\n64\t\n65\t### 4. Complete Worker Context\n66\t```bash\n67\tRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace,needle::worker=debug,needle::bead_store=debug,needle::dispatch=debug\n68\t```\n69\t**Shows:** Pluck details + worker coordination + bead store operations\n70\t\n71\t### 5. Maximum Debug Output (Not Recommended)\n72\t```bash\n73\tRUST_LOG=debug\n74\t```\n75\t**Shows:** All modules at debug level (very verbose)\n76\t\n77\t## Expected Pluck Debug Output Messages\n78\t\n79\tWhen `RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug` or higher is set, the following messages should appear:\n80\t\n81\t### 1. Evaluation Start\n82\t```\n83\t[timestamp] DEBUG strand.pluck{...}: Pluck strand evaluation starting exclude_labels=[...] split_threshold=N\n84\t```\n85\t**Shows:** Configuration values being used for this evaluation cycle\n86\t\n87\t### 2. Bead Store Query\n88\t```\n89\t[timestamp] DEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Querying bead store for ready candidates filters=...\n90\t```\n91\t**Shows:** What filters are being passed to the bead store\n92\t\n93\t### 3. Candidate Count\n94\t```\n95\t[timestamp] DEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Bead store returned N candidates\n96\t```\n97\t**Shows:** How many beads passed the initial ready() filter\n98\t\n99\t### 4. Label Filtering\n100\t```\n101\t[timestamp] DEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Filtering N candidates by labels\n102\t[timestamp] DEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Excluding bead_id=... reason=label:label_name\n103\t```\n104\t**Shows:** Which beads are excluded by label and why\n105\t\n106\t### 5. Status/Assignee Filtering\n107\t```\n108\t[timestamp] DEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Filtering by status and assignee\n109\t[timestamp] DEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Excluding bead_id=... reason=in_progress\n110\t```\n111\t**Shows:** Beads excluded due to status or assignee conflicts\n112\t\n113\t### 6. Sorting Results\n114\t```\n115\t[timestamp] DEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Sorting N candidates by priority, created_at, id\n116\t[timestamp] DEBUG needle::strand::pluck: First candidate: bead_id=... priority=N\n117\t```\n118\t**Shows:** How candidates are sorted and which is first\n119\t\n120\t### 7. Split Decision\n121\t```\n122\t[timestamp] DEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Checking split trigger failures=N threshold=M\n123\t[timestamp] DEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Split triggered: bead_id=...\n124\t```\n125\t**Shows:** Whether bead splitting is triggered and why\n126\t\n127\t### 8. Final Result\n128\t```\n129\t[timestamp] DEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Result: NoWork (no candidates)\n130\t[timestamp] DEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Result: BeadFound(bead_id=...)\n131\t[timestamp] DEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Result: Split(bead_id=...)\n132\t```\n133\t**Shows:** Final outcome of the evaluation\n134\t\n135\t## Usage Examples\n136\t\n137\t### Running NEEDLE with Pluck Debug Output\n138\t```bash\n139\t# Basic debug\n140\tRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug needle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR -c 1\n141\t\n142\t# With output capture\n143\tRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace needle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR -c 1 2>&1 | tee pluck-debug.log\n144\t\n145\t# Comprehensive debug\n146\tRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace,needle::worker=debug,needle::bead_store=debug needle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR -c 1\n147\t```\n148\t\n149\t### Using the Provided Capture Script\n150\t```bash\n151\t./capture-pluck-debug.sh /home/coding/ARMOR pluck-debug.log 1\n152\t```\n153\t**Runs:** NEEDLE with comprehensive Pluck debug settings and captures output\n154\t\n155\t## Filtering-Related Debug Options\n156\t\n157\t### Core Filtering Controls\n158\tThe debug output specifically helps diagnose these Pluck filtering stages:\n159\t\n160\t1. **Label Exclusion** (`exclude_labels`)\n161\t   - Default: `[\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"]`\n162\t   - Config location: `.needle.yaml` → `strands.pluck.exclude_labels`\n163\t   - Debug message: Shows which beads are excluded and why\n164\t\n165\t2. **Status Filtering** (hardcoded in `pluck.rs`)\n166\t   - Excludes: `in_progress` status, Open beads with stale assignee\n167\t   - Cannot be configured (always applied)\n168\t   - Debug message: Shows status-based exclusions\n169\t\n170\t3. **Dependency Filtering** (via `store.ready()`)\n171\t   - Excludes: Beads with unclosed dependencies\n172\t   - Cannot be configured (always applied)\n173\t   - Debug message: Visible in bead store query phase\n174\t\n175\t4. **Auto-Split Decision** (`split_after_failures`)\n176\t   - Config location: `.needle.yaml` → `strands.pluck.split_after_failures`\n177\t   - Current: `0` (disabled)\n178\t   - Debug message: Shows split trigger evaluation\n179\t\n180\t### Configuration Debugging\n181\tTo debug why specific beads are or aren't being selected:\n182\t\n183\t```bash\n184\t# Enable comprehensive debug\n185\tRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace,needle::bead_store=debug\n186\t\n187\t# Run NEEDLE and capture output\n188\tneedle run -w /path/to/workspace -c 1 2>&1 | tee pluck-filter-debug.log\n189\t\n190\t# Search for specific bead IDs\n191\tgrep \"bead_id=bf-XXXX\" pluck-filter-debug.log\n192\t\n193\t# Search for filtering decisions\n194\tgrep -i \"exclude\\|filter\" pluck-filter-debug.log\n195\t```\n196\t\n197\t## Troubleshooting\n198\t\n199\t### Debug Output Not Appearing\n200\t\n201\t**Symptom:** RUST_LOG is set but no Pluck debug messages appear\n202\t\n203\t**Possible Causes:**\n204\t\n205\t1. **Tracing Subscriber Not Initialized**\n206\t   - Check for: `NEEDLE worker boot: tracing subscriber initialized`\n207\t   - If missing, NEEDLE may have failed to boot properly\n208\t\n209\t2. **Incorrect Module Path**\n210\t   - Verify: `needle::strand::pluck` (exact spelling and colons)\n211\t   - Common mistake: `needle::strands::pluck` (extra 's')\n212\t\n213\t3. **Worker Claims Immediately**\n214\t   - If worker has a claimed bead, it won't run Pluck\n215\t   - Release any claimed beads first: `br release <bead_id>`\n216\t\n217\t4. **No Open Beads Available**\n218\t   - Pluck only runs when there are unclaimed, ready beads\n219\t   - Check: `br list --status open`\n220\t\n221\t5. **Log Level Too Low**\n222\t   - Use `trace` for maximum detail if `debug` shows nothing\n223\t   - Or use `RUST_LOG=trace` to see everything\n224\t\n225\t### Verifying RUST_LOG is Set\n226\t```bash\n227\t# Before running NEEDLE\n228\techo \"RUST_LOG=$RUST_LOG\"\n229\t\n230\t# Within NEEDLE output (should appear early)\n231\tgrep \"RUST_LOG\" pluck-debug.log\n232\t```\n233\t\n234\t## Reference Files\n235\t\n236\t### NEEDLE Configuration\n237\t- **Location:** `/home/coding/NEEDLE/.needle.yaml`\n238\t- **Pluck Settings:** `strands.pluck.exclude_labels`, `strands.pluck.split_after_failures`\n239\t\n240\t### Pluck Source Code\n241\t- **Location:** `/home/coding/NEEDLE/src/strand/pluck.rs`\n242\t- **Key Functions:** `evaluate()`, `new()`, filtering logic\n243\t\n244\t### ARMOR Workspace Scripts\n245\t- **Capture |\n253\t| `RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace` | Detailed execution trace | All variables, function calls |\n254\t| `RUST_LOG=needle::strand=debug,needle::strand::pluck=trace` | Full strand context | All strands + detailed Pluck |\n255\t| `RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace,needle::worker=debug,needle::bead_store=debug` | Complete worker context | Pluck + coordination + storage |\n256\t| `RUST_LOG=debug` | Maximum output (not recommended) | All modules at debug level |\n257\t\n258\t## Key Points\n259\t\n260\t1. **No Pluck-specific CLI flags** — All debugging controlled via `RUST_LOG` Pluck Debug Flags and Logging Configuration\n\n**Date:** 2026-07-09  \n**Workspace:** /home/coding/ARMOR  \n**NEEDLE Project:** /home/coding/NEEDLE\n\n## Overview\n\nPluck is a strand within the NEEDLE worker system that selects beads for processing. Debug logging for Pluck filtering decisions is controlled via Rust's standard `RUST_LOG` environment variable using the `tracing` crate.\n\n## Primary Debug Configuration\n\n### Environment Variable: `RUST_LOG`\n\n**Purpose:** Controls the log level for specific Rust modules and functions in the NEEDLE binary.\n\n**Format:** `RUST_LOG=<module_path>=<log_level>[,<module_path>=<log_level>]`\n\n## Available Log Levels\n\n| Level | Usage | Verbosity |\n|-------|-------|-----------|\n| `error` | Only errors (default if RUST_LOG not set) | Minimal |\n| `warn` | Warnings and errors | Low |\n| `info` | Informational messages | Medium |\n| `debug` | Detailed debugging information | High |\n| `trace` | Extremely detailed execution trace | Maximum |\n\n## Pluck-Specific Module Paths\n\n### Primary Pluck Module\n```\nneedle::strand::pluck\n```\n**Controls:** Core Pluck strand evaluation, filtering decisions, candidate selection logic\n\n### Related Module Paths\n```\nneedle::strand          # All strand implementations (includes Pluck)\nneedle::worker          # Worker state machine and coordination\nneedle::bead_store      # Bead storage and retrieval operations\nneedle::dispatch        # Task dispatching and execution\n```\n\n## Recommended Debug Configurations\n\n### 1. Minimal Pluck Debug Output\n```bash\nRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug\n```\n**Shows:** Filtering decisions, candidate counts, exclusion reasons\n\n### 2. Comprehensive Pluck Trace\n```bash\nRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace\n```\n**Shows:** Extremely detailed execution flow, function entry/exit, all variables\n\n### 3. Full Strand Context\n```bash\nRUST_LOG=needle::strand=debug,needle::strand::pluck=trace\n```\n**Shows:** All strand activity with detailed Pluck trace\n\n### 4. Complete Worker Context\n```bash\nRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace,needle::worker=debug,needle::bead_store=debug,needle::dispatch=debug\n```\n**Shows:** Pluck details + worker coordination + bead store operations\n\n### 5. Maximum Debug Output (Not Recommended)\n```bash\nRUST_LOG=debug\n```\n**Shows:** All modules at debug level (very verbose)\n\n## Expected Pluck Debug Output Messages\n\nWhen `RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug` or higher is set, the following messages should appear:\n\n### 1. Evaluation Start\n```\n[timestamp] DEBUG strand.pluck{...}: Pluck strand evaluation starting exclude_labels=[...] split_threshold=N\n```\n**Shows:** Configuration values being used for this evaluation cycle\n\n### 2. Bead Store Query\n```\n[timestamp] DEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Querying bead store for ready candidates filters=...\n```\n**Shows:** What filters are being passed to the bead store\n\n### 3. Candidate Count\n```\n[timestamp] DEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Bead store returned N candidates\n```\n**Shows:** How many beads passed the initial ready() filter\n\n### 4. Label Filtering\n```\n[timestamp] DEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Filtering N candidates by labels\n[timestamp] DEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Excluding bead_id=... reason=label:label_name\n```\n**Shows:** Which beads are excluded by label and why\n\n### 5. Status/Assignee Filtering\n```\n[timestamp] DEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Filtering by status and assignee\n[timestamp] DEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Excluding bead_id=... reason=in_progress\n```\n**Shows:** Beads excluded due to status or assignee conflicts\n\n### 6. Sorting Results\n```\n[timestamp] DEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Sorting N candidates by priority, created_at, id\n[timestamp] DEBUG needle::strand::pluck: First candidate: bead_id=... priority=N\n```\n**Shows:** How candidates are sorted and which is first\n\n### 7. Split Decision\n```\n[timestamp] DEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Checking split trigger failures=N threshold=M\n[timestamp] DEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Split triggered: bead_id=...\n```\n**Shows:** Whether bead splitting is triggered and why\n\n### 8. Final Result\n```\n[timestamp] DEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Result: NoWork (no candidates)\n[timestamp] DEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Result: BeadFound(bead_id=...)\n[timestamp] DEBUG needle::strand::pluck: Result: Split(bead_id=...)\n```\n**Shows:** Final outcome of the evaluation\n\n## Usage Examples\n\n### Running NEEDLE with Pluck Debug Output\n```bash\n# Basic debug\nRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug needle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR -c 1\n\n# With output capture\nRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace needle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR -c 1 2>&1 | tee pluck-debug.log\n\n# Comprehensive debug\nRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace,needle::worker=debug,needle::bead_store=debug needle run -w /home/coding/ARMOR -c 1\n```\n\n### Using the Provided Capture Script\n```bash\n./capture-pluck-debug.sh /home/coding/ARMOR pluck-debug.log 1\n```\n**Runs:** NEEDLE with comprehensive Pluck debug settings and captures output\n\n## Filtering-Related Debug Options\n\n### Core Filtering Controls\nThe debug output specifically helps diagnose these Pluck filtering stages:\n\n1. **Label Exclusion** (`exclude_labels`)\n   - Default: `[\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"]`\n   - Config location: `.needle.yaml` → `strands.pluck.exclude_labels`\n   - Debug message: Shows which beads are excluded and why\n\n2. **Status Filtering** (hardcoded in `pluck.rs`)\n   - Excludes: `in_progress` status, Open beads with stale assignee\n   - Cannot be configured (always applied)\n   - Debug message: Shows status-based exclusions\n\n3. **Dependency Filtering** (via `store.ready()`)\n   - Excludes: Beads with unclosed dependencies\n   - Cannot be configured (always applied)\n   - Debug message: Visible in bead store query phase\n\n4. **Auto-Split Decision** (`split_after_failures`)\n   - Config location: `.needle.yaml` → `strands.pluck.split_after_failures`\n   - Current: `0` (disabled)\n   - Debug message: Shows split trigger evaluation\n\n### Configuration Debugging\nTo debug why specific beads are or aren't being selected:\n\n```bash\n# Enable comprehensive debug\nRUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace,needle::bead_store=debug\n\n# Run NEEDLE and capture output\nneedle run -w /path/to/workspace -c 1 2>&1 | tee pluck-filter-debug.log\n\n# Search for specific bead IDs\ngrep \"bead_id=bf-XXXX\" pluck-filter-debug.log\n\n# Search for filtering decisions\ngrep -i \"exclude\\|filter\" pluck-filter-debug.log\n```\n\n## Troubleshooting\n\n### Debug Output Not Appearing\n\n**Symptom:** RUST_LOG is set but no Pluck debug messages appear\n\n**Possible Causes:**\n\n1. **Tracing Subscriber Not Initialized**\n   - Check for: `NEEDLE worker boot: tracing subscriber initialized`\n   - If missing, NEEDLE may have failed to boot properly\n\n2. **Incorrect Module Path**\n   - Verify: `needle::strand::pluck` (exact spelling and colons)\n   - Common mistake: `needle::strands::pluck` (extra 's')\n\n3. **Worker Claims Immediately**\n   - If worker has a claimed bead, it won't run Pluck\n   - Release any claimed beads first: `br release <bead_id>`\n\n4. **No Open Beads Available**\n   - Pluck only runs when there are unclaimed, ready beads\n   - Check: `br list --status open`\n\n5. **Log Level Too Low**\n   - Use `trace` for maximum detail if `debug` shows nothing\n   - Or use `RUST_LOG=trace` to see everything\n\n### Verifying RUST_LOG is Set\n```bash\n# Before running NEEDLE\necho \"RUST_LOG=$RUST_LOG\"\n\n# Within NEEDLE output (should appear early)\ngrep \"RUST_LOG\" pluck-debug.log\n```\n\n## Reference Files\n\n### NEEDLE Configuration\n- **Location:** `/home/coding/NEEDLE/.needle.yaml`\n- **Pluck Settings:** `strands.pluck.exclude_labels`, `strands.pluck.split_after_failures`\n\n### Pluck Source Code\n- **Location:** `/home/coding/NEEDLE/src/strand/pluck.rs`\n- **Key Functions:** `evaluate()`, `new()`, filtering logic\n\n### ARMOR Workspace Scripts\n- **Capture Script:** `/home/coding/ARMOR/capture-pluck-debug.sh`\n- **Documentation:** `/home/coding/ARMOR/notes/bf-1hm4.md` (Pluck configuration review)\n\n## Summary Table\n\n| Configuration | Use Case | Output Level |\n|---------------|----------|-------------|\n| `RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=debug` | Standard Pluck debugging | Filtering decisions, counts |\n| `RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace` | Detailed execution trace | All variables, function calls |\n| `RUST_LOG=needle::strand=debug,needle::strand::pluck=trace` | Full strand context | All strands + detailed Pluck |\n| `RUST_LOG=needle::strand::pluck=trace,needle::worker=debug,needle::bead_store=debug` | Complete worker context | Pluck + coordination + storage |\n| `RUST_LOG=debug` | Maximum output (not recommended) | All modules at debug level |\n\n## Key Points\n\n1. **No Pluck-specific CLI flags** — All debugging controlled via `RUST_LOG` environment variable\n2. **Module path is `needle::strand::pluck`** — Exact path required for filtering decisions\n3. **Default exclusions apply** — Even with empty config, `[\"deferred\", \"human\", \"blocked\"]` are excluded\n4. **Use `trace` for maximum detail** — If `debug` doesn't show enough, upgrade to `trace`\n5. **Capture output for analysis** — Use `tee` or the provided capture script to save logs\n\n## Related Documentation\n\n- Pluck Configuration Review: `/home/coding/ARMOR/notes/bf-1hm4.md`\n- NEEDLE Project: `/home/coding/NEEDLE/`\n- Bead-forge CLI Documentation: `br
